componentDescription: A visual component to display an item's status with an optional label and customizable appearance.

label.description: Defines the optional text label to be displayed next to the status indicator.

status.description: Specifies the current status of the item, which determines the indicator's visual representation (e.g., 'success', 'warning', 'error').

views.description: Provides an object to customize the styles of various sub-components within the StatusIndicator.

themeMode.description: Sets the theme mode for the component, allowing it to adapt to 'light' or 'dark' UI environments.
